name: fifa-worldcup-2026-crowd-management
description: Smart Stadium Crowd Management dashboard with Gemini AI predictions and rerouting advice.

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run preview --prefix frontend"
